HETZNER_API_TOKEN.description: Hetzner Cloud API token (a read-only token is sufficient).

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key, used to send availability notification e-mails.

API_BEARER_TOKEN.description: A long random secret. Callers must send it as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.description: Default recipient address for availability notifications.

RESEND_FROM_EMAIL.description: Sender address. Must be on a domain you have verified in Resend.
